lastInstruction: Open https://webdriveruniversity.com/Contact-Us/contactus.html. Fill the "First Name" field with "Smokeorbc", the "Last Name" field with "Routeorbc", the "Email Address" field with "smokeorbc.routeorbc@example.com", and the "Comments" field with "headless route smoke mpm4orbc". Do not submit and do not take a screenshot. Report the filled values from the page.

lastPlan.userIntent: Fill contact form fields on the specified URL and report values.

steps.notes: Navigate to the specified contact page.

steps.text: Observe the page to identify the "First Name", "Last Name", "Email Address", and "Comments" input fields.
steps.notes: Identify form fields to fill them.

steps.text: Fill the "First Name" field with "Smokeorbc"; Fill the "Last Name" field with "Routeorbc"; Fill the "Email Address" field with "smokeorbc.routeorbc@example.com"; Fill the "Comments" field with "headless route smoke mpm4orbc"
steps.notes: Enter the specified first name. Enter the specified last name. Enter the specified email address. Enter the specified comments.

steps.text: Report the filled values from the page.

lastPlan.reason: User requested to navigate to a specific URL and fill a contact form without submitting or taking screenshots, then report the values.

lastCommand.notes: Navigate to the specified contact page.
